# NA Room

> Anonymous peer-to-peer support platform for people dealing with addiction.

NA Room connects people who need help (clients) with peers who have lived experience with addiction and want to support others. No professional credentials required — this is peer support, not medical care.

## What it is

- Anonymous by design: no accounts, no email, no phone number
- End-to-end encrypted chat
- Crypto wallet used only for identity verification (no funds collected from users beyond listing/chat fees)
- Works on Tor (.onion address available)
- Open source: https://github.com/naroomer/naroom

## What it is not

- Not a medical service
- Not a crisis hotline
- Not therapy or treatment
- Not a substitute for emergency services

## How it works

**For clients (people seeking help):**
1. Verify a BTC or LTC wallet with $150+ balance (no funds moved — balance check only)
2. Post an anonymous listing for $5 — visible for 6 hours
3. Browse responses from peers
4. Accept one peer — a $15 invoice is created for the peer to pay
5. Once peer pays, an end-to-end encrypted chat opens (up to 24 hours)
6. All messages permanently deleted when session closes

**For peers (people who want to help):**
1. Verify a BTC or LTC wallet with $1,000+ balance
   - $1,000 = 2 active response slots; each additional $1,000 adds 2 more
2. Browse the board anonymously — no account needed
3. Respond to listings for free
4. If accepted, pay $15 to open the chat
5. Build anonymous reputation through client ratings (👍 / 👎)

## Fees

- Client: $5 to post a listing (6 hours), $5 to renew (adds 6 hours, up to 30-day window)
- Peer: $15 to open a chat after being accepted

## Languages

English, Russian, Spanish, Georgian

## Cities

Buenos Aires, São Paulo, Nha Trang, Da Nang, Tbilisi, Batumi, Almaty, Yerevan, Moscow

## Analytics

Public informational pages (/how-it-works, /board/*) use privacy-respecting analytics (anonymous visit counts only, no personal profile, no cross-site tracking). Chat, payment, listing, wallet, and review flows have no analytics.

## Public pages (indexed)

- /how-it-works — full guide with role switcher (client / peer) and FAQ
- /board/{city} — browse listings by city (replace {city} with a city slug above)

## Private / non-indexed flows (not crawled)

- /new — post a listing (requires wallet verification)
- /helper — peer notification sign-up
- /resume — return to an active chat session
- /chat/{room_id} — end-to-end encrypted chat room
- /listing/{id} — listing detail and accept flow
- /invoice/{id} — payment invoice
- /review/{id} — post-session rating

## Emergency

NA Room is not an emergency service. For immediate danger: Georgia/Russia: 112 · Vietnam: 113/115 · Argentina/Brazil: 112
